---
title: Belvedère 4 lacs
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784037598/belvedere4lacs_vuj2lq.png
description: forêt près du belvedère des 4 lacs, Jura
categories: ["urbansketch"]
date: 2026/07/11
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784037598/belvedere4lacs_vuj2lq.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
